title: Server FPS Enhancer
description: A simple server-side modpack designed to only improve fps.
body:
Server FPS Enhancer is a modpack made for the server side that **only** focuses on mods that boost performance. 

Optimized for smoother gameplay, reduced lag, and higher FPS, it ensures your server runs efficiently without altering gameplay mechanics or adding unnecessary features.

----

## Modlist:

### Api:
 1. [fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
   
### Performance mods:
 2. [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric/version/0.2.0+beta.7.192+1.21.4) :
  A Fabric mod designed to improve server performance at high playercounts
 3. [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium/version/2.5.0+mc1.21.4) :
  Optimises worldgen performance for a better gameplay experience
 4. [c2me fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric/version/0.3.2+alpha.0.41+1.21.4) :
  A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft
 5. [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton/version/0.2.8) :
  A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack
 6. [Servercore](https://modrinth.com/mod/servercore/version/1.5.8+1.21.4) :
  A mod that aims to optimize the Minecraft server
 7. [Alternate current](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current/version/mc1.21.2-1.9.1) :
  An efficient and non-locational redstone dust implementation
 8. [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium/version/mc1.21.4-0.15.1-fabric) :
  No-compromises game logic optimization mod. Well suited for clients and servers of all kinds
 9. [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux/version/0.1.2+beta.1+fabric.6d46f24) :
  A Fabric mod based on Starlight that improves the performance of light updates in Minecraft
10.  [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix/version/5.20.3+mc1.21.4) :
  All-in-one mod that improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs
11. [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core/version/7.1.1-fabric) :
   Memory usage optimizations
